title: Verify Remind Me toggle sends WhatsApp notification 24 hours before trial ends
description: Test that when user enables 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle, system registers reminder and shows confirmation
preconditions: User has active trial with remaining days > 1
User is on Trial Corner hub

steps.description: 2. Locate 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle in Manage Trial section

expected_result: Toggle changes to enabled state, success message appears, and remind-me-clicked event is fired with correct page source
